name: loop-it
description: Set bounded, verifiable coding loops for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Set bounded coding loops for agents.
interface.longDescription: Loop it packages a portable Agent Skill that helps Codex turn open-ended coding work into bounded, verifiable loops with explicit checks, budgets, stop conditions, approval gates, and evidence logs.
defaultPrompt: Use $loop-it to create a verified bug-fix loop.
Use $loop-it to design a docs sweep loop.
Use $loop-it to run one bounded repair pass.
